And we don't do that alone. We do that with a set of of of stakeholders working together on clear missions and use cases. For example, climate smart advisory services or early warning systems, market access and food traceability. and the methodology that we apply there is a structured approach to select the high value ones futurep proof initiatives to work very closely with different stakeholders from the private sector, government, research institutes but also farmer organizations and startups. and in this road map we identified four services.
